title: Sweet Dreams Are Made of Chocolate Cake
story: Chocolate lovers unite every January 27 for National Chocolate Cake Day! People celebrate by baking their favorite chocolate cake recipes, from rich fudge layers to gooey molten centers. Bakeries offer special deals on chocolate treats, while families gather in kitchens to mix cocoa powder and chocolate chips into delicious creations. Social media fills with drool-worthy photos of towering chocolate masterpieces. Some people try new recipes like chocolate lava cake or triple-chocolate brownies. Others simply buy their favorite slice from a local bakery and savor every bite. It's the perfect excuse to indulge your sweet tooth guilt-free!
activity_question: What do people often share on social media during National Chocolate Cake Day?
activity_choices: Photos of their chocolate cakes and treats
Pictures of their pets wearing chef hats
Videos of themselves doing jumping jacks
activity_answer: Photos of their chocolate cakes and treats
bonus_fact: The first chocolate cake recipe appeared in an American cookbook in 1847!

title: Pop Till You Drop Day!
story: Pop, pop, POP! Every January 27, people across the country celebrate National Bubble Wrap Day by doing exactly what you're thinking – popping those amazing little air bubbles! This squishy packaging material that protects our online orders has become a stress-busting superstar. People host bubble wrap stomping parties, create bubble wrap art, and even have popping contests to see who can pop the most bubbles in one minute. Some folks wrap themselves in it for the ultimate popping experience, while others use it for crafts and games. It's the one day when playing with your packaging is totally encouraged!
activity_question: What do people often do with bubble wrap on National Bubble Wrap Day?
activity_choices: Pop the bubbles for fun and stress relief
Use it only for wrapping gifts
activity_answer: Pop the bubbles for fun and stress relief
bonus_fact: The biggest bubble wrap ever made had bubbles the size of basketballs!
